assertions.description: AudioContext is exposed on the global object.
BaseAudioContext.prototype is inspectable for renderQuantumSize feature detection.
A default AudioContext either reports renderQuantumSize as 128 frames or cleanly lacks the experimental attribute.
assertions.test: (async()=>{const Ctx=window.AudioContext||window.webkitAudioContext;if(!Ctx)return false;const c=new Ctx();const ok=!('renderQuantumSize' in c)||c.renderQuantumSize===128;try{await c.close();}catch(_){}return ok;})()

assertions.description: AudioContextOptions.renderSizeHint accepts a numeric quantum hint.
renderSizeHint accepts the default keyword when implemented and otherwise falls back to a standard AudioContext.
assertions.test: (async()=>{const Ctx=window.AudioContext||window.webkitAudioContext;if(!Ctx)return false;let c;try{c=new Ctx({renderSizeHint:'default'});}catch(_){return false;}const ok=!('renderQuantumSize' in c)||c.renderQuantumSize===128;try{await c.close();}catch(_){}return ok;})()

assertions.description: renderSizeHint accepts the hardware keyword when implemented and otherwise falls back to a standard AudioContext.
OfflineAudioContext accepts renderSizeHint when implemented and otherwise falls back to the standard options dictionary.
